lessons.title: Historical Methods of Creating Mortgages
lessons.description: At common law, a mortgage was created by a conveyance of the legal fee simple to the mortgagee — the lender — subject to a proviso for redemption.

lessons.title: Mortgagees Remedies on Default
lessons.description: There are four primary remedies available to a mortgagee on default.

lessons.title: Equity of Redemption and Clogs
lessons.description: Recall from Lesson 7.1 that equity intervened to protect mortgagors who had missed the common law date for repayment.

lessons.title: Consumer Mortgage Protections
lessons.description: The primary regulatory framework for consumer mortgage protection in Ireland is the Central Bank's Code of Conduct on Mortgage Arrears, commonly known as the CCMA.
